summary: Phase 1 curriculum alignment testing — verified all LP-SYS-CUR-001 lesson titles, module names, GO completion screen with 9-module roadmap, and admin module editor. One minor discrepancy found in overview intro text.

ui_bugs.issue: Overview intro text says 'Approximately 95 minutes' but LP-SYS-CUR-001 spec requires 'Approximately 90 minutes'. File: /app/frontend/src/components/Ground0LessonPlayer.jsx line ~469

action_items: Fix overview intro text in Ground0LessonPlayer.jsx OverviewView: change 'Approximately 95 minutes' to 'Approximately 90 minutes' (line ~469)
